passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass provides 50% off regular admission for one family (immediate family/household only).
Weekends  and the following holidays are excluded: Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Eve, New Year's Day, and the 4th of July.
Please visit The Children's Piazza website (thechildrenspiazza.com) to make a reservation prior to your visit. Reservations required for entry. Pass only valid on date reserved.
The email confirmation sent to you serves as your discount pass. Please present this pass (either printed or on your mobile device) upon entry to the Children's Piazza. Library staff may print this pass for you upon request.
This is an electronic pass that will be sent to your email.
source_phrases: This pass provides 50% off regular admission for one family (immediate family/household only).
Weekends  and the following holidays are excluded: Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Eve, New Year's Day, and the 4th of July.
Please visit The Children's Piazza website (thechildrenspiazza.com) to make a reservation prior to your visit. Reservations required for entry. Pass only valid on date reserved.

The email confirmation sent to you serves as your discount pass. Please present this pass (either printed or on your mobile device) upon entry to the Children's Piazza. Library staff may print this pass for you upon request.
This is an electronic pass that will be sent to your email.

passes.title: The Childrens Piazza
source_phrases: Admission tickets are purchased at the gate with library pass. This pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze with a savings of $10 OFF the admission rate per person.

Davis Farmland Discovery Farm is open April 16th-November 1st - dates and rates change with the season. Davis Farmland and Davis Mega Maze are only open WEATHER PERMITTING. ALWAYS call or check the web before heading out. Visit DavisFarmland.com for the most up-to-date operating schedule.
NOTICE: Adults MUST be accompanied by at least 1 child 12 years or younger when visiting Davis Farmland.
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Main Library.

passes.title: The House Of Seven Gables
passes.benefit_text:
Please check Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum website at gardnermuseum.org/visit/know-before-you-go for updates before visiting.
Library passes must be redeemed online ( https://www.gardnermuseum.org/visit ) to reserve a timed ticket.  Advance tickets for timed entry are required .   
Pass admits up to 4 people at $5.00 per person. Children 17 and under admitted free.
Museum is closed on Tuesdays. Holiday closings: New Year's Day, Patriot's Day (April), Independence Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas.
Passes are valid only for general admission and do not entitle participants to Gardner museum member benefits. They are not applicable toward discounts on special events, shopping, dining, concerts, lectures, or any other public and member programs.
This is an electronic pass that will be sent to your email.

Museum is closed on Tuesdays. Holiday closings: New Year's Day, Patriot's Day (April), Independence Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas.

Passes are valid only for general admission and do not entitle participants to Gardner museum member benefits. They are not applicable toward discounts on special events, shopping, dining, concerts, lectures, or any other public and member programs.
This is an electronic pass that will be sent to your email.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. With pass, admission is discounted to $2 per visitor over the age of 2. 
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Main Branch library.

passes.title: Mass Audubon
passes.benefit_text:
Provides free parking for 1 vehicle (excluding buses and vans) for day-use parking in state parks within MA Dept. of Conservation and Recreation. MassParks Pass is not valid for Lynch Park in Beverly or Crane's Beach in Ipswich. Most parks are open year round; check the web site for details:
http://www.mass.gov/eea/agencies/dcr/massparks/places-to-go
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Main Branch Library.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
ID: 14229
Please check New England Aquarium website for any updates before visiting.
· This coupon allows 50% off admission for 4 people to the New England Aquarium.
· Only applies to adult and child pricing.
· This is not a ticket.
· Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
source_phrases: Please check New England Aquarium website for any updates before visiting.
· This coupon allows 50% off admission for 4 people to the New England Aquarium.
· Only applies to adult and child pricing.
· This is not a ticket.
· Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
· Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
· Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
· Valid only for Aquarium admission.
· This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
· Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
· Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
· Hours of operation are subject to change.
This is an electronic pass that will be sent to your email.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Please purchase your ticket online. Use the Library Museum Pass pricing level to receive 50% off admission discount for a family of up to 5 adults/children.
For hours and questions, call the NSCM at 978-538-5765 or visit www.nschildrensmuseum.org.
This is an electronic pass that will be sent to your email.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Please check Peabody Essex Museum website for updated information before visiting.
Tickets bought in advance are encouraged at pem.org/tickets or by calling  978-542-1511.
Pass admits 2 people for $12 per person for general admission only. 
Children under age 16 free general admission.
Salem Residents free general admission.
Yin Yu Tang Chinese House and other special exhibits require additional admission fees.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This discount pass is good for 4 general admissions at half price. Reservations do not need to be made in advance.
This pass is for general admission only and special programs the museum offers are not included in the pass ( this included Kids' Countdown to New Year's Eve (on New Year's Eve Day), Fairy Festival (TBD), or other programs that have special pricing)*
The Wenham Museum is not open Easter, Independence Day, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas Eve, Christmas Day or New Year's Day. We are not open on Mondays - except for MLK Day, Presidents' Day and Veterans' Day. During mid May - Labor Day, we are not open on Sundays in the Summer.
For admission for this pass, simply show the confirmation email  on your phone at the front desk of the museum or bring a printed out copy.
This is an electronic pass that will be sent to your email.

passes.title: Wenham Museum
source_phrases: Please check Zoo New England website for updated information before visiting.
Pass admits 6 people to Franklin Park Zoo (Boston) or Stone Zoo (Stoneham).
Discounted rate is $9 per adult; $6 per child.
Free admission for children under 2.
ZOOLIGHTS is not discounted with pass.
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Main Branch library.
